nodes.name: Fetch Execution
nodes.notes: Error Trigger carries no runData. Fetch it back so we can recover correlation_id + the original payload for replay. Never blocks the DLQ write.

nodes.name: Upsert DLQ Row
nodes.notes: Atomic bump_dlq RPC: insert-or-bump-attempts, poison/cap -> manual. continueRegularOutput so a Supabase blip still lets the alert fire.
